description: Jakarta RESTful Web Services API defines the annotations, interfaces, and core types used to build RESTful web services on the JVM. This artifact provides the API contracts for resources, requests, responses, media types, filters, and client/server extension points rather than a concrete implementation.

Jakarta RESTful Web Services API defines the standard annotations, interfaces, and runtime contracts for building RESTful services and clients in Jakarta EE. This artifact provides only the API types for resources, request and response handling, media negotiation, filters, interceptors, and extension points while implementations are supplied by Jakarta REST runtimes.
